title: Add flags/arguments order verification to one-arg commands - easy
body:
A follow up to https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/pull/968#issuecomment-417158706

It's a work in progress as I have to add more tests and make sure I covered all the necessary commands.

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably fe9e93d) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

This PR is trivial: adding verification to only one argument commands such as `commit`, `config` and etc.
The next part is adding this verification to `images`, `mount`, `push`, `rename` and etc.

Commands that don't need this verification are `version` and `containers`.

:pushpin: Commit 933e669 has been approved by `rhatdan`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
